overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a dimly lit, rustic bedroom with wooden architecture. The character walks steadily from a desk area across the room toward an exit doorway revealing a bathroom beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic sci-fi bedroom with canopy bed and desk

agents.ego_description: walking slowly from the desk area toward the bed and the side exit of the room

entered.detail: large bed with white linens and wooden canopy frame against the back wall
cluttered desk with papers, lamp, and coffee mug
flat screen television mounted on the right wall
large circular woven rug covering the center floor area
small wooden cabinet with items on top near the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit bedroom with warm artificial lighting. A large canopy bed dominates the center of the room, while a cluttered wooden desk sits to the right. The floor is covered by a circular woven rug, and a side cabinet is visible against the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: bedroom exit doorway with adjacent bathroom visible

events.description: character approaches the doorway revealing a lit bathroom with sink and mirror beyond

agents.ego_description: turning toward the doorway and walking to the threshold, looking into the adjacent bathroom

entered.detail: open doorway leading to an adjacent bathroom with warm lighting
white bathroom sink with countertop visible through the doorway
red and orange abstract painting hanging on the wall near the door

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the exit doorway on the left side of the bedroom, revealing a bathroom with a sink and mirror beyond. An abstract painting hangs on the wall near the door. The bed and desk recede to the right and behind as the character reaches the threshold.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit, rustic bedroom that gradually opens into an adjacent bathroom. It begins with the character walking past a cluttered wooden desk and a large canopy bed centered over a circular woven rug under warm artificial lighting. As the character advances, the bed and desk recede to the right and behind, shifting the focus toward the left side of the room. The scene then expands as the camera approaches an abstract painting on the wall, finally reaching the threshold of an exit doorway that reveals a sink and mirror in the bathroom beyond.
